title: Value must be defined as ID instead of name
symptom: An error message stating 'Must be of type integer' appears when trying to submit a form or data that requires an integer ID. This indicates that the expected data type is not being met.
applies_when: Using a field that pulls options from a table
The related column in the database expects an integer ID
not_this_if: The field is correctly set to use integer IDs
The error does not occur when using other data types
root_cause: The error occurs because the application is trying to submit a value defined as a name instead of the required integer ID. This mismatch in expected data types leads to validation errors when interacting with the database.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the field that is causing the error
Change the value definition from 'name' to 'ID'
Test the submission again to ensure the error is resolved
agent_instruction: Change the field value definition from 'name' to 'ID' and save the settings.
